title: Dump of uuid column incorrect
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE testuuid (column1 TEXT, column2 TEXT NOT NULL, column3 INTEGER DEFAULT 0);
SELECT column1, column2 FROM testuuid WHERE column1 IS NOT NULL;
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM testuuid WHERE column1 = lower(hex(randomblob(16)));
key_bug_features: UUID column dump produces incorrect results
